response.text:
```json
{
  "description": "A modal dialog window for user interaction or important information.",
  "semanticDescription": "The Dialog component displays a modal overlay window on top of the current application context. It's primarily used to prompt users for specific actions, gather input, or display critical information that requires immediate attention and prevents interaction with the underlying content until dismissed. Built on Radix UI primitives, it offers robust accessibility, focus management, and composition for creating custom dialog experiences.",
  "tier": "free",
  "whenToUse": "Use a Dialog when you need to: interrupt the user flow for critical actions (e.g., delete confirmation), collect essential data (e.g., login form), present a focused piece of information (e.g., item details), or require a user decision before proceeding.",
  "whenNotToUse": "Avoid Dialogs for non-critical notifications (use Toast), general navigation, or simple inline content disclosure (use Popover or Tooltip). Do not overuse Dialogs, as they can disrupt the user experience if not used judiciously.",
  "patterns": [
    "overlay",
    "disclosure",
    "container",
    "primitive-based",
    "composition"
  ],
  "tokens": [
    "color-surface-overlay",
    "color-text-primary",
    "color-border-default",
    "spacing-md",
    "spacing-lg",
    "font-size-lg",
    "font-weight-bold",
    "border-radius-lg"
  ],
  "examples": [
    "<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild><Button>Open Dialog</Button></DialogTrigger>
  <DialogPortal>
    <DialogOverlay />
    <DialogContent>
      <DialogTitle>Basic Dialog</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>This is a simple dialog example.</DialogDescription>
      <DialogClose asChild><Button variant="secondary">Close</Button></DialogClose>
    </DialogContent>
  </DialogPortal>
</Dialog>",
    "<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild><Button variant="danger">Delete Account</Button></DialogTrigger>
  <DialogPortal>
    <DialogOverlay />
    <DialogContent>
      <DialogHeader>
        <DialogTitle>Are you absolutely sure?</DialogTitle>
        <DialogDescription>This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.</DialogDescription>
      </DialogHeader>
      <DialogFooter>
        <DialogClose asChild><Button variant="secondary">Cancel</Button></DialogClose>
        <Button variant="danger">Delete</Button>
      </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
  </DialogPortal>
</Dialog>",
    "<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild><IconButton aria-label="Edit Profile"><Icon name="pencil" /></IconButton></DialogTrigger>
  <DialogPortal>
    <DialogOverlay />
    <DialogContent>
      <DialogHeader>
        <DialogTitle>Edit Profile</DialogTitle>
        <DialogDescription>Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you're done.</DialogDescription>
      </DialogHeader>
      <Input label="Name" value="John Doe" />
      <Input label="Email" value="john.doe@example.com" />
      <DialogFooter>
        <Button>Save changes</Button>
      </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
  </DialogPortal>
</Dialog>"
  ],
  "relatedComponents": [
    "Button",
    "Input",
    "Toast",
    "Popover",
    "Form"
  ],
  "a11yNotes": "The Dialog component provides excellent accessibility out-of-the-box, ensuring proper focus management (trapping focus inside the dialog), keyboard interaction (Escape key closes the dialog), and ARIA attributes (role='dialog', aria-labelledby, aria-describedby). Developers should ensure that all interactive elements within the dialog are keyboard accessible and that meaningful titles and descriptions are provided for screen reader users."
}
```
